workflows.title: Report Pack
workflows.purpose: Turn source material into a structured report set.
workflows.notes: Useful for documentation and business reporting.

workflows.title: Business Experiment
workflows.purpose: Turn an idea into a small experiment plan and asset list.

workflows.title: Video To Runbook
workflows.purpose: Convert a lecture, guide, or demo into a practical runbook.
workflows.notes: Good for turning tutorials into reusable process docs.

workflows.title: LinkedIn / CV Asset Update
workflows.purpose: Maintain owned professional assets with consistent source notes.

workflows.title: Owned Account Content Pipeline
workflows.purpose: Plan and package legitimate content ops for owned accounts.
workflows.notes: No spam or deceptive identity automation.

workflows.title: Repo Review Pack
workflows.purpose: Turn a codebase or repo into findings, next steps, and structured notes.
workflows.notes: Useful for GitHub and project organization work.
